race.comment: CRYPTOLINI (1) put back-to-back wins together here to start the career before being tipped out for a well-deserved spell. Has had two trials to get up to speed for this and is capable of another forward performance. PORRISTA (7) has been right there in all four runs this time in work and looks to be building up to another victory. Looms as the main danger. FORT WILLIAM (3) put in a better effort at Ipswich last time out and gets some weight off with the 2kg claim. In the mix. CHAYSE 'N' LEISA (6) maps ideally for this from gate three and will give backers a sight up on speed. FAITHINHER (12) next in line in a race with only a handful of chances.
